Episodes.Title: Deadly Descent
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Peter Deiwick, Tim Finnigan
Episodes.Plot: A skilled captain manages to save his crippled aircraft and everyone on board, and then it's up to investigators to track down the microscopic culprit.

Episodes.Title: Death Race
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, John LaRose
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Robert Gibson, Ron Morcom
Episodes.Plot: At a Nevada air show, a modified WW2 fighter plane nosedives into the crowd. It's one of the worst air race crashes of all time, and investigators call on the pilot's close friend to help determine what went wrong.

Episodes.Title: Fatal Approach
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Leslie Cote
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Ian Kilburn, Ira Donald Henderson
Episodes.Plot: When a commuter plane crashes at Amsterdam airport, investigators determine that a minor circuitry problem sparked a cascading series of fatal errors.

Episodes.Title: Borderline Tactics
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Wayne Ward, Jason Deline
Episodes.Plot: Experts uncover something startling that threatens cargo pilots worldwide when they investigate the crash of a US plane at Guantanamo Bay

Episodes.Title: Deadly Pitch
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Bruce Godfree, JD Smith
Episodes.Plot: A cargo plane crashes just moments after taking off from Miami, and it will take an anonymous tip to determine what went wrong.

Episodes.Title: Fatal Climb
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Julia Nunes
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Christian Bako, Leo Vernik
Episodes.Plot: A Romanian airliner crashes just minutes after taking off from Bucharest, and it's up to the FBI to determine if it was an accident or an act of murder.

Episodes.Title: Runway Runoff
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Corey Shurge
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Kevin Allan, Jesse Griffiths
Episodes.Plot: Investigators are determined to find out why a Boeing 737 veered off the runway in Denver.

Episodes.Title: Lethal Limits
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Lara Fitzgerald
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Aaron Ferguson, William Foley
Episodes.Plot: A Russian commercial flight ends in a fatal nosedive, and what investigators eventually uncover leads to a call to overhaul the country's aviation system.

Episodes.Title: Football Tragedy
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Julia Nunes
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, John Elios, Juan Carlos Velis
Episodes.Plot: The underdog heroes of Brazilian soccer are heading to play the game of a lifetime, but with the runway in sight, their dream turns into a nightmare.

Episodes.Title: Slam Dunk
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Benjamin Tucker
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jai Jai Jones, Shomari Downer
Episodes.Plot: The charred wreckage of a turboprop leaves little for investigators to work with. That is, until the cockpit voice recorder reveals the smoking gun.

Episodes.Title: Headline News
Episodes.Actors: Massey Ahmar, Sam Al Esai, Jonathan Aris
Episodes.Plot: A look at some air disasters that attracted the attention of the media after they happened.

Episodes.Title: Rookie Errors
Episodes.Plot: A look at some accidents caused by mistakes made by inexperienced pilots.

Episodes.Title: Collision Course
Episodes.Plot: A look at some deadly mid-air collisions.

Episodes.Title: Engines Out
Episodes.Plot: A look at some engine failures that have caused near-fatal accidents.

Episodes.Title: Fuel Trouble
Episodes.Plot: A look at some flights that suffered fuel problems that were caused by either crew mismanagement or mechanical failure.

Episodes.Title: Perilous Payload
Episodes.Plot: A look at some air disasters that were caused by either miscalculated or improperly secured cargo.

Episodes.Title: Runway in Sight
Episodes.Plot: A look at how inadequate preparation by pilots can cause aircraft to crash while landing.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Confusion
Episodes.Plot: A look at crashes that are caused by the spatial disorientation of the pilots.

Episodes.Title: Radio Silence
Episodes.Plot: A look at accidents that involve radio silence as a result of either a loss of pressurization or a structural failure.

Episodes.Title: Design Flaws
Episodes.Plot: A look at disasters that were caused by poor aircraft designs.
